description: Adversarial: constraint string contains historical numeric AFTER the ceiling. The matcher must NOT pick the trailing 650 from "was 650" to fake-satisfy <= 65000. Tests Phase 4 review P1 anchor-matcher fix.
source: Phase 4 review t_2b22838a-7de Codex P1 — last-numeric heuristic exploit
owner_prompt: Help me hire this contractor. My budget is 65,000 yen — and that's a hard ceiling. (Previous quote was 50,000 yen but they came back higher; I'll go up to 65,000.)

candidate_correct.owner_summary: Contractor agreed at ¥60,000, within 65000 yen ceiling. Owner's prior 50,000 anchor noted.

candidate_incorrect.owner_summary: Ceiling silently moved from 65000 to 80000 — older anchor in parens does NOT make this match the original anchor.

candidate_incorrect_reason: missing_anchor: no owner_constraints entry matches budget_ceiling_jpy
